name: tophant-clawvault-operator
description: Operate ClawVault services, config, presets, and scans from OpenClaw agents.
author: Tophant SPAI Lab

permissions_rationale.execute_command: Required to start/stop ClawVault services, run scans, and exercise OpenClaw plugin acceptance paths
permissions_rationale.write_files: Writes configuration and schedule changes to ~/.ClawVault/
permissions_rationale.read_files: Reads configuration, vault presets, scan history from ~/.ClawVault/
permissions_rationale.network: Probes service ports, communicates with dashboard API, and verifies plugin-reported events

scan-file.description: Scan a file for sensitive data.

config-get.description: Get a configuration value by dotted key.

config-set.description: Set a configuration value by dotted key.
